name: slides_batch_update
description: Apply a raw Google Slides API batchUpdate to a presentation for full structural editing (create/delete slides, insert text boxes and shapes, insert/replace text, add images, format text, move/resize elements, etc). You supply the requests array exactly as the Google Slides API expects it; it is passed through verbatim. Use read_presentation first to get slide and pageElement object_ids to target.

presentation_id.description: The Google Slides presentation ID to edit.

requests.description: a Google Slides API batchUpdate `requests` array (full structural editing). Each item is one Slides request object (e.g. createSlide, insertText, createShape, deleteObject, replaceAllText).

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.

returns: JSON with presentation_id, applied (request count), and the API replies array (or an error string).
notes:
requests is the RAW Google Slides API array, passed through verbatim. Worked examples:

1) Add a new slide with a predefined layout:
[{"createSlide": {"objectId": "slide_x", "slideLayoutReference": {"predefinedLayout": "TITLE_AND_BODY"}}}]

2) Insert text into an existing shape/placeholder (objectId from read_presentation):
[{"insertText": {"objectId": "title_1", "insertionIndex": 0, "text": "Quarterly Review"}}]

3) Create a text box shape on a slide, then fill it (two requests):
[{"createShape": {"objectId": "box_1", "shapeType": "TEXT_BOX", "elementProperties": {"pageObjectId": "slide_1", "size": {"width": {"magnitude": 3000000, "unit": "EMU"}, "height": {"magnitude": 1000000, "unit": "EMU"}}, "transform": {"scaleX": 1, "scaleY": 1, "translateX": 500000, "translateY": 500000, "unit": "EMU"}}}}, {"insertText": {"objectId": "box_1", "insertionIndex": 0, "text": "Hello"}}]

The slide and element object_ids come from read_presentation. When you supply your own objectId in createSlide/createShape, reference that same id in follow-up insertText requests.
